summary: Fundamental concepts of modern philosophy and epistemology.

topics.subject: Philosophy
topics.q: What is a maxim in Kant?
topics.a: A subjective rule that guides an individual's actions.
topics.ex: Waking up early out of discipline

topics.subject: Philosophy
topics.a: A universal moral principle that tests whether a maxim can apply to everyone.
topics.ex: Not lying even if it benefits you

topics.subject: Philosophy
topics.a: Because it cannot be universalized without contradiction.
topics.ex: The murderer at the door case
